title: Creamy Italian Pizza Frittata
description: A creamy twist on the classic Italian pizza, this frittata combines the flavors of Italy with a rich and creamy filling.
instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Transfer the dough to a greased 9-inch pie plate.
In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks and Italian seasoning until well combined.
Add the mantecare and mellowed to the egg yolks. Beat until smooth.
Pour the egg yolk mixture into the pie crust.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is still slightly jiggly.
Remove from the oven and top with chopped fresh basil.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
